work_queue.description: Monthly HVAC inspection - March. Check all 4 rooftop AHUs, replace filters as needed, verify thermostat calibration.
work_queue.notes: March 10 inspection (WR-2026-001) found AHU-1 fan belt showing wear. Check and replace if needed.

work_queue.description: Dock door 5 not sealing properly. Cold air leaking into loading area. Likely door seals and possibly track alignment.
work_queue.notes: Warehouse manager reports frost buildup near door 5. Affecting adjacent cold storage temperatures.

work_queue.description: Replace flickering lights in classroom 105 and hallway B. Teachers have complained about headaches.
work_queue.notes: School requests work to be done after 15:00 when students have left.

work_queue.description: Dripping faucet in 4th floor kitchen. Reported by tenant.
work_queue.notes: Tenant in suite 410. Call Anna Korhonen for access.

work_queue.description: Monthly scheduled maintenance - March. Full system inspection, filter replacement, refrigerant check, temperature calibration, defrost test.
work_queue.notes: Check compressor C-A2 contactor replaced in October (WR-2025-005) -- verify still functioning correctly.

work_queue.description: Quarterly ventilation filter replacement - Sports Hall. All 3 AHUs.
work_queue.notes: Last done October 14 (WR-2025-009). Fan belt on AHU-2 was replaced then -- check the other two.

work_queue.description: Emergency lighting annual test due. Test all units in warehouse and verify battery backup duration.
work_queue.notes: Previous test at NPS-S1 (WR-2025-003) found 3 dead batteries and 1 faulty fixture. Bring spares.

work_queue.description: Preventive check on 2nd floor east wing radiators. Were bled and pressure topped up in October (WR-2025-008). Verify air hasn't accumulated again.
work_queue.notes: If air is recurring, may indicate a system leak. Report findings so we can scope a larger investigation.
